vision: A mobile application that helps individuals manage daily tasks efficiently through straightforward task creation, tracking, and completion without unnecessary complexity.

epics.name: Task Creation
epics.description: Enable users to create new tasks with essential details to capture their daily responsibilities

stories.title: Create task with title
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to create a new task with a title, so that I can capture what I need to do
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen When I tap the add task button Then I see a form to enter task details
Given I am on the add task form When I enter a title and save Then the task appears in my task list
Given I am on the add task form When I try to save without a title Then I see an error message indicating title is required

stories.title: Add due date to task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to add a due date when creating a task, so that I can track when tasks need to be completed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the add task form When I tap the due date field Then I see a date picker
Given I have selected a due date When I save the task Then the due date is displayed with the task in the list
stories.notes: Due date is optional based on document

epics.name: Task Completion
epics.description: Allow users to mark tasks as complete to track their progress and accomplishments

stories.title: Mark task as complete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track what I have accomplished
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an incomplete task in my list When I tap the completion checkbox Then the task is marked as complete
Given a task is marked complete When I view the task list Then the task displays a visual indicator showing it is complete

stories.title: Unmark completed task as incomplete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to unmark a completed task, so that I can restore it to my active list if marked by mistake
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a completed task When I tap the completion checkbox again Then the task is marked as incomplete
Given I unmark a completed task When I view the task list Then the task no longer shows the complete indicator

epics.name: Task Deletion
epics.description: Enable users to remove tasks they no longer need from their list

stories.title: Delete task from list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to delete a task, so that I can remove items I no longer need to track
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a task in my list When I perform the delete action on that task Then the task is removed from my list
Given I delete a task When I view my task list Then the deleted task no longer appears

stories.title: Confirm before deleting task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to confirm before a task is deleted, so that I do not accidentally remove important tasks
acceptance_criteria: Given I initiate delete on a task When the delete action is triggered Then I see a confirmation prompt
Given I see the delete confirmation When I confirm Then the task is deleted
Given I see the delete confirmation When I cancel Then the task remains in my list

epics.name: Task List Viewing
epics.description: Provide users with a clear view of all their tasks in an organised list format

stories.title: View all tasks in list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to view all my tasks in a list, so that I can see everything I need to do
acceptance_criteria: Given I have tasks saved When I open the app Then I see all my tasks displayed in a list
Given I am viewing the task list When tasks exist Then each task shows its title and completion status

stories.title: View task due dates in list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to see due dates in my task list, so that I can quickly identify upcoming deadlines
acceptance_criteria: Given a task has a due date When I view the task list Then the due date is displayed with the task
Given a task has no due date When I view the task list Then no due date is shown for that task

stories.title: View empty state when no tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to see a helpful message when I have no tasks, so that I understand the list is empty and know how to add tasks
acceptance_criteria: Given I have no tasks When I view the task list Then I see a message indicating no tasks exist
Given I see the empty state When I view the screen Then I see guidance on how to create my first task

epics.name: Task Filtering
epics.description: Allow users to filter their task list to focus on specific subsets of tasks

stories.title: Filter to show incomplete tasks only
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter my list to show only incomplete tasks, so that I can focus on what still needs to be done
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I select the incomplete filter Then only incomplete tasks are displayed
Given the incomplete filter is active When I view the list Then completed tasks are hidden

stories.title: Filter to show complete tasks only
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter my list to show only complete tasks, so that I can review what I have accomplished
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I select the complete filter Then only completed tasks are displayed
Given the complete filter is active When I view the list Then incomplete tasks are hidden

stories.title: Clear filter to show all tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to clear the active filter, so that I can see all my tasks again
acceptance_criteria: Given a filter is active When I select show all or clear filter Then all tasks are displayed regardless of completion status
Given I clear the filter When I view the list Then both complete and incomplete tasks are visible

epics.name: Data Persistence
epics.description: Ensure user tasks are saved and available across app sessions

stories.title: Persist tasks locally on device
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want my tasks to be saved on my device, so that they are still there when I close and reopen the app
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks When I close the app and reopen it Then all my tasks are still visible
Given I mark a task complete When I close and reopen the app Then the task remains marked as complete
stories.notes: Walking skeleton - essential for usable app

stories.title: Access tasks while offline
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to access and manage my tasks without internet connection, so that I can use the app anywhere
acceptance_criteria: Given I have no internet connection When I open the app Then I can view all my existing tasks
Given I have no internet connection When I create or complete a task Then the changes are saved locally
stories.notes: Based on assumed offline capability requirement
